wins_analysis: No wins today as no orders were placed. The system correctly identified that only 1 setup existed and that ICICIBANK had a 0/5 recent win record, leading to a justified skip decision.
losses_analysis: No losses today as no trades were executed. The decision to not place the ICICIBANK order was sound given: (1) AI probability was only 48%, (2) the symbol failed just yesterday, and (3) the weekly track record shows 0 wins in 5 trades indicating the strategy parameters are fundamentally miscalibrated.
regime_impact: Trending_up with ADX 25 and low VIX 12.6 should theoretically favor demand zone BUY setups, but the system found only 1 qualifying setup across all 50 stocks. This suggests either zone detection parameters are too tight, or most stocks have already moved away from demand zones in the uptrend — the regime helps direction but zones may be stale.

improvements.action: Raise minimum AI probability threshold from current implicit 45% to 55% — do not place any order below 55% regardless of zone score
improvements.reason: ICICIBANK at 48% probability was correctly skipped but the system still surfaced it as a recommendation. Filtering earlier prevents cognitive load and false signals. Historical data shows sub-50% probability setups have near-zero win rate.

improvements.action: Blacklist ICICIBANK for the next 5 trading sessions — require a minimum 3-day cooling period after any symbol accumulates 3+ consecutive losses
improvements.reason: ICICIBANK has 0 wins in 5+ recent trades. Continuing to surface it wastes the single daily opportunity. The symbol may have structural issues (institutional selling, range compression) that make zone-based entries unreliable right now.

improvements.action: In trending_up regime with ADX>22, expand scan to include breakout/retest setups above supply zones, not just demand zone bounces — add momentum continuation entries at prior day high breaks
improvements.reason: Only 1 demand zone setup found across 50 stocks in a strong uptrend. Stocks trending up rarely revisit deep demand zones. The strategy needs a trend-following variant that catches pullbacks to 9/21 EMA rather than waiting for distant demand zones.

improvements.action: When total setups found is ≤2, deploy capital into a simple Nifty 50 index ETF momentum trade (BUY if Nifty above 9EMA on 15min) rather than forcing individual stock setups
improvements.reason: Market gained +0.6% today with zero participation from the bot. On low-setup days in uptrending regimes, index-level trades would capture broad market moves without needing individual stock zone confluence.

improvements.action: Reduce required risk:reward from current ~3:1 (₹7.73 SL vs ₹23.19 target on ICICIBANK) to 2:1 with tighter targets — this increases fill probability and may improve the 0% win rate
improvements.reason: Consistently targeting 3:1 R:R with wide targets means price rarely reaches TP before reversing. A 2:1 target with partial profit-taking at 1.5:1 would convert more setups into actual wins, building confidence in the system.

tomorrow_focus: If market continues trending_up with ADX>22, prioritize stocks showing fresh demand zone formation from today's session (same-day zones) on large-cap momentum names like RELIANCE, HDFCBANK, TCS rather than recycling stale ICICIBANK zones.

symbol_notes.ICICIBANK: Blacklisted — 0 wins in 5+ recent attempts, failed again yesterday, barely met threshold today at 48% prob. Avoid for at least 5 sessions.
symbol_notes.RELIANCE: Monitor for fresh demand zone formation given broad market uptrend — if it pulled back intraday today, tomorrow's zone may be actionable.
symbol_notes.HDFCBANK: Large-cap banking peer to ICICIBANK — check if it offers cleaner demand zone setup as rotation candidate.
